'''[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Natrom''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] stationed aboard the [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. He was the commanding officer of [[Korlo Brightwater]].

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
